errors.description: The agent hallucinated the answer 'Giovanni Castiglione' instead of the correct 'Alfonso Visconti' from the example trace, fabricating information without valid justification.
errors.impact: Provided an incorrect final answer, failing the task objective.

scores.reliability_reasoning: Incorrect answer due to hallucination undermines trustworthiness.
